description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential neighborhood block featuring several modern houses arranged along a central asphalt road. Each house is set on a rectangular green lawn, with driveways, garages, and some visible backyard amenities such as pools and patios. The houses are predominantly white with flat or gently sloped roofs, large windows, and minimalistic facades, reflecting a contemporary architectural style. The block includes paved sidewalks, a few scattered trees, and a mix of single and two-story homes, some with attached garages and others with detached structures. The layout is orderly, with clear property boundaries and open green spaces between the buildings. The overall scene suggests a planned, upscale residential area with a focus on clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern suburban neighborhood block with several white, flat-roofed houses, green lawns, and a central road. The houses feature large windows, driveways, and minimalistic design elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the neighborhood from above, highlighting the green lawns, white houses, and the central road with driveways and garages visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the front facades of the houses are visible, showcasing entryways, large windows, and some backyard features like pools.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear sides of the houses, with visible patios, backyards, and additional garage structures.
description_view_3: This view presents the opposite end of the block, focusing on the garages, driveways, and the arrangement of houses along the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, some with small porches or steps, and occasional overhangs or columns.
